steps.title: Recognize complementary angles
steps.content:
Triangle $MNP$ is a right triangle with acute angles $N=64^\circ$ and $P=26^\circ$. These angles are complementary because
$$64^\circ+26^\circ=90^\circ$$

steps.title: Apply the cofunction identity
steps.content:
For complementary angles, the cosine of one angle equals the sine of the other:
$$\cos P=\sin N$$The answer is B.
